Event: Magic Well - December 2023
Event Date: 01/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: AR222


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Shadow Fusion Outfit

Once in a while, the fighter's spell power is increased by 50% and the fighter gains a shield that blocks 350000 of any damage for 5 sec.

Once in a while, when a fighter uses a weapon, armor, ring or amulet ability, the fighter casts restoration on the allied fighter with the lowest current health. It removes a random negative effect from them and restores 200000 of their health. Also, enhances their damage by 45% and increases their health by 20% and reduces incoming damage by 25% for 3 sec. The ability can also be applied to the armor owner.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
